office_does: The assessor values taxable property, maintains parcel records, and administers exemptions and appeals under state law.
race_blurb: The race contrasts challenger Doug Stults’s local valuation and systems background with incumbent Kelly Todd Mauck’s accredited assessment record.

candidates.summary: Stults is a property-assessment candidate emphasizing accurate valuations, responsive appeals, service, and modern systems.
highlights: Emphasizes appeals, service, and system modernization [S1]

experience.basis: He brings relevant valuation experience but no documented tenure leading the assessor office.

candidates.summary: Mauck is the incumbent assessor and an accredited assessment professional emphasizing uniform valuation, compliance, access, and training.
highlights: Emphasizes uniform valuations, compliance, and staff training [S1]

experience.basis: Incumbency and accredited assessment experience establish the race’s strongest direct institutional record.
